channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why your IoT devices are the weakest link in security
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Svetlin Todorov, Fast Company

item.title: SEC and Binance request 60-day pause in lawsuit as the agency shifts to be more crypto-friendly
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is seeking to pause its high-profile lawsuit against the cryptocurrency exchange Binance as the regulator tries to present itself as more crypto-friendly under a new administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Following Google, Apple’s maps now show Trump’s Gulf of Mexico name change
item.description: Apple renamed the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America on its maps Tuesday after an order by President Donald Trump was made official by the U.S. Geographic Names Information System.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: House Commerce chair launches data privacy working group
item.description: House Committee on Energy and Commerce Chair Brett Guthrie (R-Ky.) on Wednesday announced the creation of a data privacy working group as policymakers work toward a national privacy standard.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT’s latest feature is a transformative leap for web research
item.description: I’m not sure who first compared ChatGPT to Cliff Clavin, the garrulous mailman/barfly from TV’s Cheers. It’s so an apt comparison that many people probably came up with it independently. Cliff did know a lot of stuff—after all, he was a Jeopardy almost-winner.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Apple TV is finally available on Android devices – just in time to stream MLS and Severance season 2
item.description: You can now download the Apple TV app on Android devices via the Google Play Store to stream Apple TV+ and MLS Season Pass.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Google Chrome might soon use AI to make you a better password
item.description: Google’s possibly impending ‘AI innovation’ makes getting on top of data breaches that much easier, but there’s little else to it other than convenience.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: The Gulf of America: A New Name for a Historic Body of Water
item.description: Apple Maps has renamed the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America, following Trump's executive order. Google and Bing Maps have also made changes.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Scarlett Johansson calls out AI misuse after viral video ripping Ye
item.description: Scarlett Johansson says while she has "no tolerance" for hate speech, she's calling out the "misuse" of artificial intelligence (AI) in a viral video featuring her and other Jewish performers responding to antisemitic remarks by Ye, the rapper formerly known as Kanye West.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, The Hill

item.title: Leica could launch a controversial M-series camera this year with a new kind of viewfinder – it sounds like function over soul
item.description: Leica is apparently working on a M-series camera with an EVF, which would be a first and open the series up to a new direction.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Snowflake announces preview of Cortex Agent APIs to power enterprise data intelligence
item.description: Snowflake on Wednesday announced the public preview of Cortex Agents, a set of APIs built on top of the Snowflake Intelligence platform, a low-code offering that was first launched in November at Build, the company’s annual developer conference.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Opinion: DeepSeek exposed dangerous AI nonsense that Trump and Biden fell for
item.description: Instead of trying to keep the AI genie bottled up, government and industry should be preparing us for sweeping changes.
item.dc:creator: Zeynep Tufekci, The Mercury News

item.title: Wes Anderson’s The Phoenician Scheme is arriving sooner than you think, and I'm hugely excited for Michael Cera’s cameo
item.description: We finally have a release date for Wes Anderson's next movie – here's what we know about The Phoenician Scheme so far.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti early pricing rumors are making me fear the worst for the cost of this mid-range GPU
item.description: There are already ominous rumblings that Nvidia’s RTX 5070 Ti GPU isn’t coming to the rescue of PC gamers, as early price rumors are a definite worry.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Is this the iPhone SE 4? New Apple device seemingly appears in leaked images as revised release date emerges
item.description: The iPhone SE 4 could launch slightly later than expected, but leaked photos have given us a clear look at the possible design.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New US CIO appointments, February 2025
item.description: Movers & Shakers is where you can keep up with new CIO appointments and gain valuable insight into the job market and CIO hiring trends.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Rust memory management explained
item.description: Rust shares many concepts with other languages intended for systems programming. For instance, Rust distinguishes between memory allocated from the stack and memory allocated from the heap. It also ensures that variables declared within a scope are unavailable outside of that scope.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 ways Tesla stands to win from Elon Musk’s war on the U.S. government
item.description: Elon Musk has long railed against the U.S. government, saying a crushing number of federal investigations and safety programs have stymied Tesla, his electric car company, and its efforts to create fleets of robotaxis and other self-driving automobiles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Notre Dame scores big with Wi-Fi 6E stadium upgrade
item.description: When 80,000 fans fill the University of Notre Dame’s iconic football stadium on Saturday afternoons in the fall to cheer on the Fighting Irish, there’s no shortage of high-decibel screaming. And now, thanks to a major network expansion, there’s no shortage of high-bandwidth streaming.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump's AI ambition and China's DeepSeek overshadow an AI summit in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The geopolitics of artificial intelligence will be in focus at a major summit in France where world leaders, executives and experts will hammer out pledges on guiding the development of the rapidly advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Is PSN still down? PlayStation Network addressing ongoing outage
item.description: Thousands of users have reported outages with the PlayStation Network since Friday evening but as of Saturday morning things still didn't seem back normal.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, NewsNation

item.title: Huge healthcare data breach exposes over 1 million Americans' sensitive information
item.description: Community Health Center, a Connecticut-based healthcare provider, has disclosed a recent data breach affecting over 1 million people in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AWS plans to outspend Microsoft and Google on AI infrastructure
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) intends to invest $100 billion in ramping up infrastructure for AI cloud services this year, surpassing the spending plans of rivals Microsoft and Google.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New law in Brazil is making students put away their smartphones at school
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian students returned to class this week with a new task: staying away from their smartphones as a new law restricting their use in schools took effect.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups
item.description: GSA senior leaders are saying the Trump administration’s long-term goal is to merge GSA, OPM and OMB into a single agency. The post GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network
